name: PowerHD USB-Link
description: Set centre point, endpoints and PWM band on Power HD programmable servos via the PG-CB63 program box.
notes: Ships as a .rar (unpacked with Windows' bundled bsdtar) wrapping an NSIS installer whose manifest is requireAdministrator, so installing raises a UAC prompt; RC Central retries elevated. Verified end-to-end 2026-07-20: the installer honours /D={dest} and stays inside the tool dir. exe_relative_path MUST stay pinned - the installed app is PowerHD.exe, but the folder also holds PowerHDSetup.exe, uninst.exe, vcredist2013_x86.exe and two CP210xVCPInstaller exes, and the single-exe fallback scan only happens to work because _EXE_SKIP drops all of them. The bundled CP2102 USB driver installs itself; Windows 10/11 also pulls that bridge from Windows Update, so no drivers[] entry. The manufacturer is HuiDa RC at chd.hk - powerhd.com is a parked stub with a mismatched cert. The download is linked only from this 2021 news post, though the archive's contents are dated 2024-10; both the version and a literal space are in the URL, so it rots on the next release.
